inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Current market price of sheet metal. Source: industry benchmark (e.g., MEPS).

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material wasted. Typical range 10-30% for sheet metal. Source: Lean manufacturing standards.

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced per year. Used to scale scrap cost.

inputs.label: Part Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of each finished part. Source: engineering BOM.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including overhead. Source: industry labor surveys.

inputs.label: Cycle Time per Part
inputs.businessContext: Time to produce one part. Source: time studies.

inputs.label: Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost to dispose of scrap material. Source: waste management contracts.

inputs.label: Rework Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of parts requiring rework. Source: quality records.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Part
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to rework a defective part. Source: cost accounting.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment. Source: data governance policy.

thresholds.scrapRate > 20: High scrap rate warning: consider process improvement.
thresholds.reworkRate > 10: High rework rate warning: investigate root causes.
thresholds.materialCostPerKg > 5: Material cost above typical range; review supplier pricing.

suggestedActions: Implement nesting optimization to reduce scrap.
Review stamping process parameters to lower scrap rate.
Consider preventive maintenance to reduce rework.
Negotiate better material pricing or alternative suppliers.
